Off Calendar Oct-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-01-2021 Continued To Oct-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Alicia Gamez appeared by zoom for Michael McConnell.

The Court stated that it does not understand Mr. Gamez's position as to the will and that it does not think the will dated June 14, 2020 is a codicil. Ms. Gamez stated that she does not oppose that, that bond was waived, and that Michael is the named Executor. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition and admit the will dated June 14, 2020. Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for December 14, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-09-2020 Continued To Sep-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
